intentSynonyms: restore a completed a comment in gdocs
mark not done a comment in gdocs
reopen a comment in google docs
description: Reopen a previously resolved comment thread. In the Drive API, reopening is done by creating a reply with action "reopen".

document_id.description: Google Docs document ID. Defaults to the document open in the current editor tab.

comment_id.description: Comment thread ID to reopen (from list_comments)
